migrations.title: Open WebUI Provider Configuration
migrations.description: Move from global provider variables to explicit provider/model blocks.

steps.title: Provider definition
steps.description: Replace global API toggles with provider objects.
steps.notes: This enables cleaner multi-provider routing in UI.

steps.title: Model presets
steps.description: Set defaults as named presets instead of one global model string.
steps.after:
modelPresets:
  fast: openai/gpt-4o-mini
  quality: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6
defaultPreset: fast
steps.notes: Safer upgrades when providers deprecate model IDs.
